seoTitle: San Francisco Unified School District Calendar 2025-2026: Key Dates & PDF
seoDescription: View the SFUSD 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 18 first day, Jun 10 last day, recesses, holidays, official PDF and ICS download.
instructionalDaysDescription: The official SFUSD 2025-2026 academic calendar lists 180 total student days after labor action make-up days were added.
calendarNotes: This page summarizes major student dates from the official SFUSD district-wide academic calendar. The 2025-2026 calendar includes no-school days due to labor action and added June make-up days, so families should use the final official PDF for this school year.

calendarFaqs.q: When did San Francisco Unified start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: San Francisco Unified students started the 2025-2026 school year on Monday, August 18, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When was the last day of school for SFUSD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of spring instruction on the final SFUSD 2025-2026 calendar was Wednesday, June 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Why did the SFUSD 2025-2026 calendar end on June 10?
calendarFaqs.a: The final SFUSD 2025-2026 calendar notes that June 4-10 were added to make up for five lost days in the 2025-2026 school year labor action.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Instruction
yearNumbers.detail: The official SFUSD calendar lists 82 fall instructional days.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Instruction
yearNumbers.detail: The official SFUSD calendar lists 98 spring instructional days after labor action make-up days.

yearNumbers.label: Labor Action Make-Up
yearNumbers.detail: The final calendar notes that June 4-10 were added to make up for five lost labor action days.

events.name: No School due to Labor Action
No School due to Labor Action End
